arguments.summary: Read CliParser with flags and basic parsing. Need to add subcommand support where each subcommand has its own flag definitions.

running 2 tests

arguments.summary: Added subcommand support: subcommands HashMap on CliParser, subcommand() builder method, parse() detects subcommand name and delegates remaining args to its parser. ParsedArgs has optional subcommand field. All tests pass.
arguments.final_answer:
Added subcommand support to CliParser in src/lib.rs:
- subcommands HashMap<String, CliParser> field
- subcommand(name, parser) builder method
- parse() detects subcommand as first non-flag arg, delegates remaining args
- ParsedArgs includes subcommand: Option<(name, Box<ParsedArgs>)>
All tests pass.
